Interface IDistanceMeasurement

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Distance measurement and its associated uncertainty information.

[Guid("C997D6A9-2B49-42DA-97DD-34EB32A14A02")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IDistanceMeasurement

Properties

AngularUnit

The angular unit of the distance measurment.

string AngularUnit { get; set; }

Property Value

string

The azimuth angle of the distance measurement.

double AzimuthAngle { get; set; }

double

AzimuthAngleUncertainty

The uncertainty of the azimuth angle measurement.

double

double

double

Sample Snippet

The elevation angle of the distance measurement.

double ElevationAngle { get; set; }

double

Sample Snippet

ElevationAngleUncertainty

The uncertainty of the elevation angle measurement.

double ElevationAngleUncertainty { get; set; }

double

The height measurement at the first point.

double

Sample Snippet

HeightAtPoint2

The height measurement at the second point.

double HeightAtPoint2 { get; set; }

double

double
